subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Thou hast expressed satisfaction with the Convention
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از کنونشن نهایت رضایت اظهار نموده بودی که این
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @House of Justice, @unity; oneness of humanity, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
